'''Uba I''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Uba system/Legends|Uba system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It was a home to an [[Ubese/Legends|Ubese]] colony, which was destroyed by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in the [[bombardment of the Uba system]] during the [[New Sith Wars]].{{Planet-stub}}
